mentions.note: Manufacturing AI infrastructure play with accelerating growth and profit three quarters running; Siemens $50M partnership validates; growing like weed but Cramer needs more knowledge before strong recommendation.

AI-powered marketplace digitizing offline $275B custom manufacturing market. 37% CAGR revenue growth; Siemens $50M investment + platform integration validates moat and distribution. Only 1% online vs. 40% electronics, 10% cars. Proprietary training data on outcomes creates high barriers. Reshoring tailwind: 40-50% US capacity idle, Zometry connecting supply to demand.
